claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: No real backend transcript readiness, protocol soundness, sampling hardness, quantum advantage, or BQP separation is established.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: B4/B8 now has five explicit PR packets for real backend properties, hardware execution transcripts, leakage-separated real fitting, leakage-blind no-leak margin, and full-leakage containment.

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: real_backend_properties_used must become true while preserving the current B4/B8 verifier-private transcript fields.
required_artifacts: backend properties from a real device snapshot or provider export
per-qubit and per-edge timing/error/readout metadata
calibration timestamp, backend identifier, and provider provenance
mapping from exported properties into the verifier circuit layout

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: hardware_execution_performed must become true and the transcript schema must replay through the current fitted-spoofer evaluator.
required_artifacts: hardware or independently supplied execution transcript rows
circuit id, shot id, refresh mode, leakage profile, and predicate outcome columns
raw-to-processed transcript hash ledger
explicit no-refresh, challenge-refresh, and refresh-plus-rotation coverage

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: leakage_separated_real_training_performed must become true and real_backend_transcript_rows must be positive.
required_artifacts: leakage-separated train/holdout split over real transcript rows
private-safe, leakage-blind, and leakage-aware fitted families
fitted evaluation rows with the same 560/160 discipline or justified larger split
negative-control splits that prevent private-material leakage from contaminating no-leak training
leakage-blind no-leak fitted acceptance table
same private-safe no-leak denominator table
diagnostic proving no-leak acceptance stays below 0.10
predicate redesign notes if leakage-blind fitting remains unsafe

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: full-private-material leakage acceptance must be <= 0.25 or the claim boundary must explicitly exclude that leakage regime.
required_artifacts: full-private-material leakage acceptance table
explicit claim boundary excluding full leakage or a cryptographic protection layer
challenge-material redesign evidence if full leakage remains in scope
bounded leakage model with verifier-private material still hidden

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: The source readiness gate must stay valid and fail only R5-R9.
contract_requirements.label: Source readiness gate is valid and fails only R5-R9

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Preserve the synthetic transcript denominator while adding real rows.
contract_requirements.label: Synthetic transcript and fitted-spoofer denominators remain available

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Keep this simulated denominator, but do not treat it as real backend evidence.
contract_requirements.label: GenericBackendV2 bridge remains a calibrated simulator denominator

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Every failed readiness gate must map to a concrete PR packet.
contract_requirements.label: PR packets exist for every failed real-backend readiness gate

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Attach real backend properties with provenance and layout mapping.
contract_requirements.label: Real backend properties packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Submit hardware or independent execution transcript rows.
contract_requirements.label: Hardware execution packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Train and hold out leakage-separated spoofers on real transcript rows.
contract_requirements.label: Leakage-separated real fitting packet has been satisfied
Leakage-blind no-leak margin packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Bound full-private-material leakage or move it outside the claim boundary.
contract_requirements.label: Full-private-material leakage packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Do not promote B4/B8 until K5-K9 pass under replayable evidence.
contract_requirements.label: Forbidden advantage and soundness claims remain absent
